title: Bridge Paper: The neurological implications of metacognition.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dashboard Diagnosis** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Metacognition — self-monitoring, metacognitive awareness, prefrontal-parietal insight circuits.

Paper: The neurological implications of metacognition.
DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2026.1756611
Abstract: This review synthesizes current understanding of metacognitive processes across neuroscientific, clinical, and educational domains. Metacognition, defined broadly to encompass knowledge/awareness, and monitoring/regulation of one's cognitive processes spans both neurological and psychological domains.
